scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @transrota/shared && npm run build --workspace @transrota/api && npm run build --workspace @transrota/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @transrota/api && npm run lint --workspace @transrota/web
